scripts.build: npm --prefix luxor-hub install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix luxor-hub run build && rm -rf dist && cp -r luxor-hub/dist dist
scripts.build:dev: npm --prefix luxor-hub install --no-audit --no-fund && npx --prefix luxor-hub vite build --mode development && rm -rf dist && cp -r luxor-hub/dist dist
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix luxor-hub install && npm --prefix luxor-hub run build
